rows.label: qev012203_MSG0002
rows.name:
My repairs finished at the exact
same time the battle ended![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's some splendid coordination! It
was my first time doing something
resembling a tactical operation, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Maybe I actually have
a talent for this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, the fort is defeated and
the Doll is fixed. Now I can
finally resume my adventure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0006
rows.name:
Next... Let's see. I think I'll
head north and try landing on
this Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0007
rows.name:
I ended up relying on
you yet again, Senpai.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0008
rows.name:
I truly respect a Senpai who takes
such good care of their juniors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well then! I'm in a
hurry, so I'll be off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0012
rows.name:
If we meet somewhere,
let's coordinate again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012203_MSG0013
rows.name:
Next time, you'll see my
heroic figure in battle![ST:wait ]
